faqs.question: How do I invest in HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund?
faqs.answer: INDmoney makes it simple to invest in the HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund. To do so, follow the steps below:Download the INDmoney app.Search for ‘HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund’.Select whether you want to invest in SIP or lump sum.Enter the amount you wish to invest.Set up payments via bank mandate or UPI.

faqs.question: What is the current NAV of HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund?
faqs.answer: The NAV of the fund today is ₹18.60. NAV or Net Asset Value is the per unit price of a mutual fund. For example, if the NAV of a fund is ₹10, it means you can get 1000 units of that mutual fund at ₹10,000.

faqs.question: What is the return on the fund?
faqs.answer: HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund fund has generated a return of 21.02% in 1 year, 17.23% in 3 years

faqs.question: Who is the fund manager of HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund?
faqs.answer: The fund managers are Anand Laddha, Dhruv Muchhal.

faqs.question: What is the exit load of the fund?
faqs.answer: The exit load is 1% if redeemed in 0-30 Days. Exit load is a fee levied for ‘exiting’ the fund earlier than a stipulated period, usually 1 year.

faqs.question: What is the expense ratio of the fund?
faqs.answer: The expense ratio is 0.80%. The Expense Ratio is a fee charged for managing the fund. This includes commissions, administrative costs etc.

faqs.question: What is the AUM of the fund?
faqs.answer: The AUM of the fund is ₹4486 Cr. AUM stands for Assets Under Management. It refers to the total assets managed by the fund.

faqs.question: What are the top holdings of HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund?
faqs.answer: The top 3 holdings of the fund are HDFC Bank Ltd(18.85%), ICICI Bank Ltd(15.1%), Axis Bank Ltd(8.67%)
